title: ADQUATOR 50pcs 50×35cm Red Tissue Paper,Wrapping Paper Bulk for DIY Gift Wedding Birthday DIY Christmas Decorations
features: 💗【Package Content】：Include 50 sheets 50 * 35cm tissue paper.Convenient to use, no fold marks and white edge.
💗【Vividly colour】:Red colour will make gift more pretty and shining.And it is a joy to wrap gifts in lovely tissue paper.
💗【Recyclable】：Gift tissue paper are 100% recyclable and eco-friendly material. And the paper are thick and won’t tear when wrapping gift.
💗【Widely Application】:Tissue paper can be used for decorating gift bags or wrapping present. The best choice for Christmas, Valentine's Day,Birthday, Party and so on.
💗【Better Service】：If you are not satisfied with it, we would like to full refund for you. Your problem can be solved in 24 hours.
